title: Manufacturing Engineer - Wavin India Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Wavin India Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India Holdings Services:
Wavin India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India Holdings Services!
